events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: spring can travel pins not pulled after hydro. Spring hangers (variable spring supports) have travel pins that lock the spring during installation/hydrotest. After hydrotest, these pins must be pulled/removed so the spring can function properly. If pins are not pulled after hydro, the spring hanger is not operating as designed — it's locked, not supporting the pipe as intended. This is non-compliant with manufacturer requirements and project support standards.

Decision: fail
Risk: medium-high (improper support can lead to overstress of piping)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective
Percent complete: maybe 90
Confidence: high
